---
title: "Data Nuances"
---

The gotchas an analyst should know before using this data. Per-dataset detail lives in each cleaning
script's companion `.md` (in `scripts/02_clean/`); this page collects the cross-cutting ones.

## No deduplication — duplicates are flagged, not dropped

Every event asset keeps all raw rows and labels repeats with `dup` (occurrence index within the event id;
`0` = first row) and `dup_exact` (byte-identical to an earlier row). **Filter `dup == 0` for distinct
events.** Duplication is heavy in some sources and negligible in others:

- **certs** — ~81% duplicate rows (the raw table has one row per program/pollutant per certification).
- **enforcement** — informal actions ~48% duplicate; formal ~1%.
- **inspections / violations / stack tests** — ~0%; the flags are near-inert but kept for consistency.

## Reporting coverage ramps over time

Coverage of the violation determination-date fields increases across the window, so **early-year
determination counts are sparse — a reporting artifact, not a real decline.**

## Junk dates

A few source dates carry implausible years (e.g. 3-digit years). These fail to parse (`NA`); a record with
no usable date is dropped (never imputed), and each cleaner prints how many it dropped.

## Delimited, multi-valued fields

`program`, `pollutant`, `NAICS_CODES`, and `SIC_CODES` can hold several values in one string. They are kept
as-is (not split), so match with substrings rather than equality.

## Facility attributes are a current snapshot

Class, industry, and operating status come from the current ICIS snapshot and are **time-invariant here** —
applied to every year. There is no facility entry/exit history.

## Unplaceable facilities cascade

A facility with no FRS coordinate has no `county_fips` and cannot be placed for any geography-based join.

## Enforcement specifics

- Formal actions are dated by **settlement**, which can lag the filing by months or years.
- A **multi-facility settlement broadcasts one penalty across every co-defendant** — do not sum `penalty`
  across facilities for a total; sum over `dup == 0` within a facility.
- Some actions **re-use an `enf_identifier`** at different dates; keep this in mind when interpreting
  distinct-action counts and the active universe.

## Certifications do not cover every major, every year

Being class-Major is not the same as being an annual Title V certifier — do not assume one certification
per major facility per year.
